pages.title: Multiple Resource Types
pages.text: PreFabs track $(bold)separate accumulators$() for each resource:$(br2)Resource: Iron Ingot   Rate: 0.213/tick   Accumulator: 0.85 (not ready)$(br2)Resource: Gold Ingot   Rate: 0.15/tick   Accumulator: 0.45 (not ready)$(br2)Resource: Copper Ingot   Rate: 0.5/tick   Accumulator: 1.25 (ready. Push 1, remainder 0.25)$(br2)Each resource accumulates independently.
